options.c(3) Library Functions Manual options.c(3)

NAME

options.c - WASM shared option setters and getters.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_width (int value)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_width (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_height (int value)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_height (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_color_mode (int mode)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_color_mode (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_color_filter (int filter)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_color_filter (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_palette (const char *palette_name)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_palette (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_palette_chars (const char *chars)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE const char * get_palette_chars (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_matrix_rain (int enabled)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_matrix_rain (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_flip_x (int enabled)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_flip_x (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_flip_y (int enabled)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_flip_y (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_render_mode (int mode)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_render_mode (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int set_target_fps (int fps)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_target_fps (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE const char * get_help_text (int mode, const char *option_name)

Detailed Description

WASM shared option setters and getters.

Provides unified option access for all WASM modes. These functions are compiled into both mirror.wasm and client.wasm.

Definition in file src/web/common/options.c.

Function Documentation

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int get_color_filter (void )

70                            {
71   return GET_OPTION(color_filter);
72 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  const char * get_help_text (int mode, const char * option_name)


Get help text for a CLI option in a specific mode Exported to WASM
    for JavaScript access via FFI




Parameters


mode The mode (asciichat_mode_t as int)


option_name The long name of the option


Returns


Help text string or NULL if not applicable


Definition at line 204 of file
    src/web/common/options.c.


204                                                              {
205   if (!option_name || !option_name[0])
206     return NULL;
207   asciichat_mode_t mode_enum = (asciichat_mode_t)mode;
208   return options_get_help_text(mode_enum, option_name);
209 }






References options_get_help_text().

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int set_palette (const char * palette_name)


Definition at line 79 of file
    src/web/common/options.c.


79                                           {
80   if (!palette_name)
81     return -1;
82 
83   palette_type_t palette_value;
84   char *error_msg = NULL;
85 
86   if (!parse_palette_type(palette_name, &palette_value, &error_msg)) {
87     if (error_msg) {
88       log_error("Failed to parse palette '%s': %s", palette_name, error_msg);
89       free(error_msg);
90     }
91     return -1;
92   }
93 
94   asciichat_error_t err = options_set_int("palette_type", (int)palette_value);
95   return (err == ASCIICHAT_OK) ? 0 : -1;
96 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, log_error,
    options_set_int(), and parse_palette_type().






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int set_palette_chars (const char * chars)


Definition at line 104 of file
    src/web/common/options.c.


104                                          {
105   if (!chars)
106     return -1;
107   asciichat_error_t err = options_set_string("palette_custom", chars);
108   return (err == ASCIICHAT_OK) ? 0 : -1;
109 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, and
  options_set_string().
